channel.title: PrimitiveKit – Data-Display
channel.description: Recent content in Data-Display on PrimitiveKit

item.title: Avatar
item.description:
Avatar

Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.

Import 

import { AvatarComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-avatar>Content</pk-avatar>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Avatar component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-avatar [style]="{
 '--avatar-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--avatar-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-avatar>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --avatar-size
  • --avatar-bg-color
  • --avatar-color
  • --avatar-border-radius
  • --avatar-border-width
  • --avatar-border-color
  • --avatar-font-size
  • --small
  • --large
  • --square
  • … and 1 more

Accessibility

The Avatar component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.
  • Empty - Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Avatar
item.description:
Avatar

Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.

Import 

import { Avatar } from '@primitivekit/astro';

Basic Usage 

<Avatar>Content</Avatar>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Avatar component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Avatar style={{
'--avatar-bg-color': '#007bff',
'--avatar-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Avatar>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --avatar-size
  • --avatar-bg-color
  • --avatar-color
  • --avatar-border-radius
  • --avatar-border-width
  • --avatar-border-color
  • --avatar-font-size
  • --small
  • --large
  • --square
  • … and 1 more

Accessibility

The Avatar component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.
  • Empty - Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Avatar
item.description:
Avatar

Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.

Import 

import Avatar from '@primitivekit/svelte/Avatar.svelte';

Basic Usage 

<Avatar>Content</Avatar>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Avatar component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Avatar style={{
 '--avatar-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--avatar-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Avatar>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --avatar-size
  • --avatar-bg-color
  • --avatar-color
  • --avatar-border-radius
  • --avatar-border-width
  • --avatar-border-color
  • --avatar-font-size
  • --small
  • --large
  • --square
  • … and 1 more

Accessibility

The Avatar component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.
  • Empty - Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Avatar
item.description:
Avatar

Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.

Import 

import { Avatar } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const avatar = new Avatar({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(avatar.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Avatar component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const avatar = new Avatar({
 style: {
 '--avatar-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--avatar-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --avatar-size
  • --avatar-bg-color
  • --avatar-color
  • --avatar-border-radius
  • --avatar-border-width
  • --avatar-border-color
  • --avatar-font-size
  • --small
  • --large
  • --square
  • … and 1 more

Accessibility

The Avatar component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.
  • Empty - Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Avatar
item.description:
Avatar

Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.

Import 

import { Avatar } from '@primitivekit/vue';

Basic Usage 

<Avatar>Content</Avatar>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Avatar component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Avatar style={{
 '--avatar-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--avatar-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Avatar>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --avatar-size
  • --avatar-bg-color
  • --avatar-color
  • --avatar-border-radius
  • --avatar-border-width
  • --avatar-border-color
  • --avatar-font-size
  • --small
  • --large
  • --square
  • … and 1 more

Accessibility

The Avatar component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.
  • Empty - Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Collapse
item.description:
Collapse

Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.

Import 

import { CollapseComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-collapse>Content</pk-collapse>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Collapse component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-collapse [style]="{
 '--collapse-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--collapse-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-collapse>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --collapse-background
  • --bordered
  • --collapse-border-width
  • --collapse-border-style
  • --collapse-border-color
  • --collapse-border-radius
  • --collapse-item-border-bottom-width
  • --collapse-item-border-bottom-style
  • --collapse-item-border-bottom-color
  • --collapse-item-margin-bottom
  • … and 40 more

Accessibility

The Collapse component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Avatar - Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.
  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.
  • Empty - Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Collapse
item.description:
Collapse

Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.

Import 

import { Collapse } from '@primitivekit/astro';

Basic Usage 

<Collapse>Content</Collapse>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Collapse component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Collapse style={{
'--collapse-bg-color': '#007bff',
'--collapse-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Collapse>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --collapse-background
  • --bordered
  • --collapse-border-width
  • --collapse-border-style
  • --collapse-border-color
  • --collapse-border-radius
  • --collapse-item-border-bottom-width
  • --collapse-item-border-bottom-style
  • --collapse-item-border-bottom-color
  • --collapse-item-margin-bottom
  • … and 40 more

Accessibility

The Collapse component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.
  • Empty - Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

item.title: Collapse
item.description:
Collapse

Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.

Import 

import Collapse from '@primitivekit/svelte/Collapse.svelte';

Basic Usage 

<Collapse>Content</Collapse>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Collapse component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Collapse style={{
 '--collapse-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--collapse-text-color': '#ffffff'

item.title: Collapse
item.description:
Collapse

Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.

Import 

import { Collapse } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const collapse = new Collapse({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(collapse.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Collapse component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const collapse = new Collapse({
 style: {
 '--collapse-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--collapse-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --collapse-background
  • --bordered
  • --collapse-border-width
  • --collapse-border-style
  • --collapse-border-color
  • --collapse-border-radius
  • --collapse-item-border-bottom-width
  • --collapse-item-border-bottom-style
  • --collapse-item-border-bottom-color
  • --collapse-item-margin-bottom
  • … and 40 more

Accessibility

The Collapse component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Avatar - Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.
  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.
  • Empty - Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.description:
Collapse

Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.

Import 

import { Collapse } from '@primitivekit/vue';

Basic Usage 

<Collapse>Content</Collapse>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Collapse component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Collapse style={{
 '--collapse-bg-color': '#007bff',

Tab Move focus to/from component

  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.

item.title: Empty
item.description:
Empty

Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

Import 

import { EmptyComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-empty>Content</pk-empty>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Empty component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-empty [style]="{
 '--empty-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--empty-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-empty>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --empty-padding
  • --empty-text-align
  • --empty-max-width
  • --empty-margin
  • --empty-transition-duration
  • --empty-transition-timing
  • --empty-animation-duration
  • --empty-animation-timing
  • --empty-image-width
  • --empty-image-height
  • … and 32 more

Accessibility

The Empty component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Avatar - Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.
  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Empty
item.description:
Empty

Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

Import 

import { Empty } from '@primitivekit/astro';

Basic Usage 

<Empty>Content</Empty>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Empty component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Empty style={{
'--empty-bg-color': '#007bff',
'--empty-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Empty>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --empty-padding
  • --empty-text-align
  • --empty-max-width
  • --empty-margin
  • --empty-transition-duration
  • --empty-transition-timing
  • --empty-animation-duration
  • --empty-animation-timing
  • --empty-image-width
  • --empty-image-height
  • … and 32 more

Accessibility

The Empty component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Avatar - Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.
  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Empty
item.description:
Empty

Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

Import 

import Empty from '@primitivekit/svelte/Empty.svelte';

Basic Usage 

<Empty>Content</Empty>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Empty component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Empty style={{
 '--empty-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--empty-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Empty>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --empty-padding
  • --empty-text-align
  • --empty-max-width
  • --empty-margin
  • --empty-transition-duration
  • --empty-transition-timing
  • --empty-animation-duration
  • --empty-animation-timing
  • --empty-image-width
  • --empty-image-height
  • … and 32 more

  • ✅ Keyboard accessible

  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes

  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Tab Move focus to/from component

  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.

item.title: Empty
item.description:
Empty

Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

Import 

import { Empty } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const empty = new Empty({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(empty.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Empty component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const empty = new Empty({
 style: {
 '--empty-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--empty-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --empty-padding
  • --empty-text-align
  • --empty-max-width
  • --empty-margin
  • --empty-transition-duration
  • --empty-transition-timing
  • --empty-animation-duration
  • --empty-animation-timing
  • --empty-image-width
  • --empty-image-height
  • … and 32 more

Accessibility

The Empty component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Avatar - Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.
  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Empty
item.description:
Empty

Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

Import 

import { Empty } from '@primitivekit/vue';

Basic Usage 

<Empty>Content</Empty>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Empty component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Empty style={{
 '--empty-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--empty-text-color': '#ffffff'

  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.

item.title: Image
item.description:
Image

Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.

Import 

import { ImageComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-image>Content</pk-image>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Image component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-image [style]="{
 '--image-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--image-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-image>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --image-display
  • --image-position
  • --image-overflow
  • --image-border-radius
  • --image-background
  • --image-transition-duration
  • --image-transition-timing
  • --image-width
  • --image-height
  • --image-object-fit
  • … and 38 more

Accessibility

The Image component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Avatar - Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.
  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Empty - Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Image
item.description:
Image

Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.

Import 

import { Image } from '@primitivekit/astro';

Basic Usage 

<Image>Content</Image>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Image component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Image style={{
'--image-bg-color': '#007bff',
'--image-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Image>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --image-display
  • --image-position
  • --image-overflow
  • --image-border-radius
  • --image-background
  • --image-transition-duration
  • --image-transition-timing
  • --image-width
  • --image-height
  • --image-object-fit
  • … and 38 more

Accessibility

The Image component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Avatar - Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.
  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Empty - Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Image
item.description:
Image

Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.

Import 

import Image from '@primitivekit/svelte/Image.svelte';

Basic Usage 

<Image>Content</Image>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Image component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Image style={{
 '--image-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--image-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Image>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --image-display
  • --image-position
  • --image-overflow
  • --image-border-radius
  • --image-background
  • --image-transition-duration
  • --image-transition-timing
  • --image-width
  • --image-height
  • --image-object-fit
  • … and 38 more

Accessibility

The Image component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Avatar - Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.
  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Empty - Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference

item.title: Image
item.description:
Image

Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.

Import 

import { Image } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const image = new Image({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(image.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Image component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const image = new Image({
 style: {
 '--image-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--image-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --image-display
  • --image-position
  • --image-overflow
  • --image-border-radius
  • --image-background
  • --image-transition-duration
  • --image-transition-timing
  • --image-width
  • --image-height
  • --image-object-fit
  • … and 38 more

Accessibility

The Image component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Avatar - Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.
  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Empty - Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Image
item.description:
Image

Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.

Import 

import { Image } from '@primitivekit/vue';

Basic Usage 

<Image>Content</Image>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Image component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Image style={{
 '--image-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--image-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Image>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --image-display
  • --image-position
  • --image-overflow
  • --image-border-radius
  • --image-background
  • --image-transition-duration
  • --image-transition-timing
  • --image-width
  • --image-height
  • --image-object-fit
  • … and 38 more

Accessibility

The Image component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Avatar - Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.
  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Empty - Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Table
item.description:
Table

Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.

Import 

import { TableComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-table>Content</pk-table>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Table component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-table [style]="{
 '--table-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--table-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-table>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --table-border-width
  • --table-border-style
  • --table-border-color
  • --table-border-radius
  • --table-background
  • --table-header-background
  • --table-header-padding
  • --table-header-color
  • --table-header-font-weight
  • --table-header-border-bottom-width
  • … and 31 more

Accessibility

The Table component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Avatar - Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.
  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.
  • Empty - Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.description:

Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.

No props available.

Customization

'--table-bg-color': '#007bff',
'--table-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Table>

  • --table-border-width
  • --table-border-style
  • --table-border-color
  • --table-border-radius
  • --table-background
  • --table-header-background
  • --table-header-padding
  • --table-header-color
  • --table-header-font-weight
  • --table-header-border-bottom-width
  • … and 31 more

Accessibility

The Table component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Related Components

  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.
  • Empty - Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

item.description:
Table

Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.

Import 

import { Table } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const table = new Table({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(table.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Table component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const table = new Table({
 style: {
 '--table-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--table-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }

  • --table-border-width

item.title: Tag
item.description:
Tag

Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.

Import 

import { TagComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-tag>Content</pk-tag>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Tag component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-tag [style]="{
 '--tag-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--tag-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-tag>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --tag-bg-color
  • --tag-color
  • --tag-border-color
  • --tag-border-radius
  • --tag-padding-x
  • --tag-padding-y
  • --tag-font-size
  • --small
  • --large
  • --primary
  • … and 4 more

Accessibility

The Tag component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Avatar - Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.
  • Empty - Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.description:

Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.

Import 

import { Tag } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const tag = new Tag({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(tag.element);

Customization

The Tag component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const tag = new Tag({
 style: {
 '--tag-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--tag-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }

item.title: Typography
item.description:
Typography

Text component for consistent typography with predefined styles and semantic HTML.

Import 

import { TypographyComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-typography>Content</pk-typography>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Typography component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-typography [style]="{
 '--typography-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--typography-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-typography>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --typography-font-family
  • --typography-font-size
  • --typography-font-weight
  • --typography-line-height
  • --typography-letter-spacing
  • --typography-text-align
  • --typography-text-transform
  • --typography-text-decoration
  • --typography-color
  • --typography-margin-top
  • … and 27 more

Accessibility

The Typography component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Avatar - Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.
  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Typography
item.description:
Typography

Text component for consistent typography with predefined styles and semantic HTML.

Import 

import { Typography } from '@primitivekit/astro';

Basic Usage 

<Typography>Content</Typography>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Typography component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Typography style={{
'--typography-bg-color': '#007bff',
'--typography-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Typography>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --typography-font-family
  • --typography-font-size
  • --typography-font-weight
  • --typography-line-height
  • --typography-letter-spacing
  • --typography-text-align
  • --typography-text-transform
  • --typography-text-decoration
  • --typography-color
  • --typography-margin-top
  • … and 27 more

Accessibility

The Typography component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Avatar - Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.
  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Typography
item.description:
Typography

Text component for consistent typography with predefined styles and semantic HTML.

Import 

import Typography from '@primitivekit/svelte/Typography.svelte';

Basic Usage 

<Typography>Content</Typography>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Typography component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Typography style={{
 '--typography-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--typography-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Typography>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --typography-font-family
  • --typography-font-size
  • --typography-font-weight
  • --typography-line-height
  • --typography-letter-spacing
  • --typography-text-align
  • --typography-text-transform
  • --typography-text-decoration
  • --typography-color
  • --typography-margin-top
  • … and 27 more

Accessibility

The Typography component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Avatar - Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.
  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Typography
item.description:
Typography

Text component for consistent typography with predefined styles and semantic HTML.

Import 

import { Typography } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const typography = new Typography({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(typography.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Typography component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const typography = new Typography({
 style: {
 '--typography-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--typography-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --typography-font-family
  • --typography-font-size
  • --typography-font-weight
  • --typography-line-height
  • --typography-letter-spacing
  • --typography-text-align
  • --typography-text-transform
  • --typography-text-decoration
  • --typography-color
  • --typography-margin-top
  • … and 27 more

Accessibility

The Typography component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Avatar - Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.
  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Typography
item.description:
Typography

Text component for consistent typography with predefined styles and semantic HTML.

Import 

import { Typography } from '@primitivekit/vue';

Basic Usage 

<Typography>Content</Typography>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Typography component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Typography style={{
 '--typography-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--typography-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Typography>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --typography-font-family
  • --typography-font-size
  • --typography-font-weight
  • --typography-line-height
  • --typography-letter-spacing
  • --typography-text-align
  • --typography-text-transform
  • --typography-text-decoration
  • --typography-color
  • --typography-margin-top
  • … and 27 more

Accessibility

The Typography component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Avatar - Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container.
  • Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
  • Table - Data display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and pagination.
  • Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
  • Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide
